sections.title: What about MFC? Where is the MFC located?
sections.content:
The MFC is located in the center of Krasnodar.

Addresses of the MFC in Krasnodar:
- Main office: st. Krasnaya, 176, bldg. 1
- Branch: st. Kubanskaya, 45
- Branch: Karl Marx Ave., 77

Opening hours: Mon-Fri 08:00-19:00, Sat 09:00-13:00
Phone: +7-861-262-0000

sections.title: How about me register? How to register?
sections.content:
REGISTRATION PROCESS:
1. Arrival at the MFC with documents
2. Receiving a number in the electronic queue
3. Waiting for an operator to call
4. Submitting documents to the operator
5. Receiving a receipt
6. Waiting for results (usually 3-5 days)

IMPORTANT: Do not delay registration!
Fine for being late: 5000-7000 rubles

sections.title: ¿Información sobre dormitorio? Information about the hostel
sections.content:
HOSTEL FOR FOREIGN STUDENTS:

TERMS:
- 2-3 people per room
- Bed, wardrobe, desk
- Shared kitchen and bathroom
- Internet enabled

COST: 150-300 rubles per month
APPLICATION: Send email. letter to dormitory@kubsu.ru

CURRENTHOUR:
- Weekdays: 23:00-07:00
- Weekends: 24:00-08:00

sections.title: How about conseguir póliza médica? How to get a medical insurance?
sections.content:
HEALTH INSURANCE IS MANDATORY:

PROCESS:
1. Contact the MFC insurance company
2. Provide documents
3. Pay for the policy (5000-8000 rubles/year)
4. Get a compulsory medical insurance policy

POLICY VALID:
- In any public clinic
- In private institutions under contract
- Includes: consultations, tests, treatment

sections.title: ¿Qué nivel de ruso necesito? What level of Russian language is needed?
sections.content:
RUSSIAN LANGUAGE REQUIREMENTS:

BACHELOR:
- Minimum: level B1 (TRKI-II certificate)
- Recommended: B2 for full training

MASTER'S PROGRAM:
- Minimum: B2

PREPARATION COURSE:
- Available at KubSU
- Intensive: 3-6 months
- Cost: 50,000-100,000 rub.
